name: D.D. Assault Carrier
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>異</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>次</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>元</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>強</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>襲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>艦</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Cannot declare an attack unless you banish 1 card from your GY. If exactly 3 of your cards are banished: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use this effect of "D.D. Assault Carrier" once per turn.
mnst_eff: Cannot declare an attack unless you banish 1 card from your GY. If exactly 3 of your cards are banished: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use this effect of "D.D. Assault Carrier" once per turn.
eff: Cannot declare an attack unless you banish 1 card from your GY. If exactly 3 of your cards are banished: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use this effect of "D.D. Assault Carrier" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
